name: nuvio-browser-extension
description: Open supported movie and TV pages directly in Nuvio.

scripts.check: npm test && node --check browser-api.js && node --check core.js && node --check content.js && node --check options.js && node --check launch.js
scripts.package: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && zip -r dist/open-in-nuvio.zip manifest.json browser-api.js core.js content.js options.html options.css options.js launch.html launch.css launch.js icons
